No Poverty.reason: The course content, focusing on calculus, has no direct or indirect relevance to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content does not relate to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture practices.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content has no connection to health services, disease prevention, mental health, or overall well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and foundational skills for future professional studies, aligning with relevant learning outcomes (Target 4.4).

使學生能將微積分運用於未來學習之專業課程 (enables students to apply calculus to future professional courses)

Gender Equality.reason: There is no explicit or implicit evidence in the syllabus that the course addresses gender equality or related issues.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content on calculus does not relate to water quality, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not address energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Calculus provides foundational skills for advanced fields, indirectly supporting technological upgrading and innovation for economic productivity (Target 8.2) and future employment.

學習更進階之數學課程 (learning of more advanced mathematics courses)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The syllabus does not contain any specific elements related to reducing income, social, economic, or political inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course content does not relate to urban planning, sustainable infrastructure, housing, or cultural heritage.

Climate Action.reason: The course content does not relate to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness-raising.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content does not relate to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course content does not relate to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course content does not relate to peace, justice, rule of law, governance, or institutional development.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The syllabus does not mention any partnerships, global cooperation, or means of implementation for the SDGs.
